name: User Signed Up
description: Fires when a new user account is successfully registered via /auth/signup.

name: User Logged In
description: Fires when a user successfully authenticates via /auth/login.

name: Login Failed
description: Fires when a login attempt fails due to bad credentials or inactive account.

name: Driver Created
description: Fires when a new driver record is saved, including auto-generated driver number.

name: Shift Created
description: Fires when a new cab shift is created via POST /shifts.

name: Shift Activated
description: Fires when a shift transitions to active status via PUT /shifts/{id}/activate.

name: Shift Deactivated
description: Fires when a shift is deactivated via PUT /shifts/{id}/deactivate.

name: Shift Ownership Transferred
description: Fires when a shift's cab ownership is transferred to a different driver.

name: Invoice Generated
description: Fires when a new invoice is created for an account customer.

name: Invoice Sent
description: Fires when an invoice is marked as sent via PUT /invoices/{id}/send.

name: Invoice Cancelled
description: Fires when an invoice is cancelled via PUT /invoices/{id}/cancel.

name: Invoice Emailed
description: Fires when an invoice PDF is emailed to the customer.

name: Credit Card Transactions Uploaded
description: Fires when a credit card transaction CSV is successfully processed and saved.

name: Airport Trips Uploaded
description: Fires when an airport trip CSV is successfully uploaded and processed.

name: Mileage Records Uploaded
description: Fires when a mileage CSV is successfully uploaded and records are persisted.

name: Taxi Caller Import Triggered
description: Fires when a manual TaxiCaller API import is initiated by a user.

name: Taxi Caller Import Completed
description: Fires when a TaxiCaller scheduled or manual import finishes with success or error.

name: EFT File Generated
description: Fires when an EFT (Electronic Funds Transfer) file is generated for payroll.

name: Report Downloaded
description: Fires when any financial or driver report PDF is downloaded by a user.

name: Lease Rate Override Created
description: Fires when a driver- or cab-specific lease rate override is saved.

name: Recurring Expense Created
description: Fires when a new recurring expense (e.g. dispatch fee, insurance) is saved.

name: One Time Expense Created
description: Fires when a one-time expense is added to a shift or driver.

name: Payment Recorded
description: Fires when a payment is recorded against an account or invoice.

name: Receipt Analysed
description: Fires when an uploaded receipt is processed by the Gemini AI classifier.

name: User Created By Admin
description: Fires when an admin creates a new user account for another person.
